_doc: Implementation backlog for the single sequential Ralph loop. SOURCE OF TRUTH for done/not-done + dependency order; docs/HARNESS.md §8.1 = schema. Each task's `do` + `done-when` live in a per-task Markdown spec at the `spec` path (.harness/tasks/TNNN.md, sections '## Do' / '## Done when'); every BUILDABLE task carries `facets` (difficulty auto-tuning) — a needs-human gated task is carved out and carries none. `gate` is `null` (buildable) or `needs-human` (a one-time human step). Kakitori v1 backlog authored from docs/01–07 (the design docs are the product spec) following the M0–M5 roadmap in docs/07-roadmap.md.

SwiftData models: Deck + Section
SwiftData model: Note + Script classification
SwiftData model: CardSchedule + CardState

Guide box row component (genkō yōshi boxes)

Session summary screen (お疲れさま！)

Register .apkg document type (Open in Kakitori)

Listen & Write mode (聞き取り)
Translate & Write mode (翻訳)
Recall mode (思い出し)
Mode availability rules per deck and card
Mixed mode rotation + new-cards-always-trace-first

iPhone compact Home, deck setup, and summary layouts
Dark mode palette

App icon

SM2Scheduler: learning + relearning transitions
Fix empty session (daily cap reached): finish immediately, never dead buttons
Shared daily-allowance helper: banner + deck chips reflect today's allotment, not full backlog
Deck card: 'completed today' progress indicator (X of Y against today's allotment)
Deck card: never render the deck name twice / a Latin string in the JP serif slot
Fix Mixed practice-mode subtitle: not 'four modes'
Curate showcase deck characters per bundled deck + the character↔mode-row mapping (owner's creative pick)
Render curated deck characters as the DeckSetupSheet mode-row glyphs (auto-pick fallback for uncurated decks)
Clean up the 'Show answer' reveal — no background flash, no layout jump
Settings: replace daily-limit Steppers with clamped numeric inputs
DeckSetupSheet: fix clipped sheet on iPhone (.medium detent too short, Start writing CTA cut off)
DeckSetupSheet: fix 'N cards due' subtitle wording over a new-card count
Fix low-contrast canvas ink: resolve ink color to concrete high-contrast color per appearance
verify: Draw a stroke on the canvas in LIGHT mode on iPad (Kakitori-Sim) — the stroke must be near-black (~#1A1A1A), clearly high-contrast against the paper, not mid-grey; screenshot it.

Draw a stroke on the canvas in DARK mode on iPad (Kakitori-Sim, `xcrun simctl ui <udid> appearance dark`) — the stroke must be near-white (~#F0EDE6), clearly high-contrast, not mid-grey; screenshot it.
Repeat both light and dark screenshots on iPhone (Kakitori-Sim-Phone, compact layout).
Confirm the faded trace-guide glyphs (KakitoriTheme.inkFaint in GuideBox / TraceGuideLayer) are visibly unchanged — still low-contrast, in all four screenshots.

tasks.title: Prune retired bundled decks on version-gated load (5->3)
Fix Listen & Write audio silence: activate AVAudioSession + surface errors + TTS-fallback on missing file
Canvas: centre the guide box and constrain ink to it (drawable rect == visible box)
Make Home screen scrollable so decks below the fold are reachable
Per-deck daily tracking: key DailyStats by deck so one session no longer caps every deck
Session progress bar counts completions, not attempts — never advances on "Again"
Settings: restyle on-brand + make numeric fields obviously editable
Fix SummaryView compact button labels swapped vs actions ('Back home' reopens setup)
Trace mode must not autoplay card audio on entry
Fire card autoplay on view appearance, not in view-model init/grade
Don't launch a hollow session when a deck is already caught up
Free Study session path decoupled from SRS (no schedule, no stats)
Free Study entry point + visibly-distinct Free Study session UI
'Study another' on Summary routes to a deck/script picker, not the same deck
Settings number fields: allow clearing while focused so a new value can be typed
Grow the writing canvas to fill the pane, as one continuous surface sized to N characters
